arts.ttl: Arsenal star drops shock team news hint for Ipswich as Mikel Arteta handed Thomas Partey twist
arts.sum: Following that however, Arsenal have six days between the visit of Crystal Palace to Emirates Stadium and the first leg of their Champions League semi-final, also on home soil, against PSG. Just four days ago, the Gunners pulled off a memorable win inside the Bernabeu with a 2-1 victory seeing them defeat Real Madrid 5-1 on aggregate in the Champions League quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: Athletic Club release Nico Williams statement amid Arsenal summer transfer talk
arts.sum: Contributing two goals and one assist to Spain's Euro 2024-winning antics last summer, 22-year-old Williams found himself tied in rumours to Europe's elite clubs including the Gunners . Athletic Club have announced an untimely groin injury for Arsenal-linked attacker Nico Williams, saying that the extent 'is pending'.

arts.ttl: Live on Sky: Ipswich vs Arsenal | Injured Gunners duo set to miss out
arts.sum: "(The Real Madrid game) doesn't come into our thinking too much," McKenna told Ipswich club media. Kieran McKenna insists Ipswich can compete with an Arsenal team in high spirits after booking their place in the Champions League semi-finals.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Whether Nico Williams actually wants to sign for Arsenal or Barcelona after talks with Andrea Berta
Arsenal 'suffer major transfer blow' as top forward target Nico Williams drops hint over his future
arts.sum: Athletic Bilbao attacker Nico Williams - linked with Arsenal and Barcelona - suggests that he wants to spend at least one more season at San Mames.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer target Nico Williams clears his future with Champions League ambition
arts.sum: Arsenal’s chances of signing Athletic Bilbao winger Nico Williams have been dealt a major blow. The Spaniard, who was part of Spain’s Euro 2024 winning team last year, has caught the attention of Arsenal and some other big clubs with his consistent performances for his club and country.
